text.content: Premium press-on band solid cusion tire optimized for durability and performance. Designed with a durable tread compound to supply 15% more wear resistsance than the MS601. Enhanced mixing and building process ensures optimum performance in the working environment.

rich_text.plain_text: Premium press-on band solid cusion tire optimized for durability and performance. Designed with a durable tread compound to supply 15% more wear resistsance than the MS601. Enhanced mixing and building process ensures optimum performance in the working environment.

text.content: Premium natural rubber compounds: Compounds do not contain crumb rubber or other fill materials Low Rolling Resistance (LRR) black for high energy efficiency Chunk-resistant non-marking (NM) with heat dissipating core Tear-resistant (T600) provides high resistance to physical damage XFR (extreme fiber reinforced) for maximum durability R90 (90 durometer roller) for stationary roller applications
